pending_tasks.phase: Health Fix: Low test coverage: only 0 test files found
pending_tasks.prompt:
Fix this WorldPulse project health issue: Low test coverage: only 0 test files found

Context: WorldPulse is an open-source global intelligence network (Next.js 15, Fastify,
PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Meilisearch). Investigate the root cause, implement the fix,
verify the solution works, and add any necessary tests. Do not ask for confirmation.

Add comprehensive test coverage to WorldPulse. Focus on:
1. Critical API routes (auth, signals, feed, search)
2. Scraper pipeline logic (fetch, parse, score)
3. Database query functions
4. Frontend hook utilities

Use Vitest. Each test file should have at least 5 meaningful test cases.
Write tests to /apps/api/src/__tests__/ and /apps/scraper/src/__tests__/.
Do not ask for confirmation.

completed_tasks.phase: Competitive: Multi-LLM provider support — Anthropic Claude + Google Gemini + OpenRouter (5 providers total, matches Crucix)
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 65: Extended apps/api/src/lib/signal-summary.ts to support 5 LLM providers in priority order: (1) Anthropic claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY); (2) OpenAI gpt-4o-mini (OPENAI_API_KEY); (3) Google Gemini 2.0 Flash (GEMINI_API_KEY); (4) OpenRouter configurable model (OPENROUTER_API_KEY, default meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct:free); (5) Ollama local (OLLAMA_URL); (6) extractive fallback. Added generateWithAnthropic(), generateWithGemini(), generateWithOpenRouter() functions using native fetch. Updated AISummary.model union type to include all 5 providers. Updated .env.example with documentation for all 5 options. Added 4 new test cases to signal-summary.test.ts covering Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter, and Anthropic priority over OpenAI. WorldPulse now matches Crucix's multi-LLM capability (Crucix supports 7 providers; WorldPulse now has 5 via API + Ollama local).

completed_tasks.phase: Developer Experience: GraphQL API layer at /api/graphql (major competitive differentiator)
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 49: Implemented full GraphQL API layer using mercurius (Fastify's GraphQL plugin). (1) apps/api/src/graphql/schema.ts — types: Signal, SignalConnection, PageInfo, User, Query; queries: signal(id), signals(category,severity,limit,offset,since), search(q), trending; (2) apps/api/src/graphql/resolvers.ts — resolvers querying PostgreSQL via existing knex, Redis caching 30s TTL for signals/60s for trending, public read-only access; (3) apps/api/src/graphql/index.ts — registerGraphQL() Fastify plugin, mercurius registered at /api/graphql, GraphiQL enabled in dev, JIT compilation, full introspection; (4) Registered in apps/api/src/index.ts; (5) apps/api/src/__tests__/graphql.test.ts — test cases for signals query, single signal, category filter, pagination, search, null ID. mercurius added to apps/api/package.json. No competitor (Shadowbroker, Ground News, Crucix, OSINT Monitor) has GraphQL — pure WorldPulse differentiator.

Competitive: AI content farm / slop detection for reliability scoring
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 29: Implemented AI-generated content heuristic scorer. (1) apps/api/src/lib/ai-content-farms.ts — blocklist of 25 known AI content farm domains seeded from NewsGuard/CCDH public reports; (2) apps/api/src/lib/slop-detector.ts — SlopDetector class with scoreSignal() method: domain blocklist (+0.40), missing byline (+0.15), clickbait title patterns (+0.10), thin content <100 chars (+0.10), high cadence >10/hr same domain (+0.10), bare URL path (+0.05) — score clamped [0,1], Redis 24h cache, singleton export; (3) GET /api/v1/signals/:id/slop-score route added to apps/api/src/routes/signals.ts (admin-only, 30rpm, returns score/flags/isSlop); (4) AISlopBadge component added to apps/web/src/app/signals/[id]/SignalDetailClient.tsx — fetches slop-score on mount, shows ⚠ AI-generated content suspected badge with amber styling when score>=0.7, graceful error handling, admin-only visibility; (5) apps/api/src/__tests__/slop-detector.test.ts — 11-case test suite covering all heuristics, cache hit/miss, score clamping, invalidation. Direct open-source alternative to NewsGuard's closed AI content farm detection tool.

completed_tasks.phase: Observability: Sentry error tracking + structured logging + /api/v1/health + OTel tracer
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 33: Implemented 4-part observability suite. (1) apps/api/src/routes/health.ts — enhanced GET /api/v1/health with per-service checks: db (SELECT 1), redis (PING), kafka (admin.listTopics, 2s timeout), each returning status ok|degraded|down + latency_ms + error; overall status = down if db down, degraded if kafka/redis degraded, 503 HTTP if db down; (2) apps/api/src/middleware/request-logger.ts — Fastify plugin with onRequest (UUID requestId stamping) + onResponse (structured pino log: requestId, userId from JWT, method, route pattern, url, statusCode, latency_ms, ip, userAgent; skips /health /metrics /api/docs noise) + onError (errName, errMsg, statusCode); (3) apps/api/src/lib/sentry.ts — optional Sentry wrapper with dynamic require (no hard dep): initSentry(), captureException(), captureMessage(), setSentryUser(), flushSentry(); gracefully no-ops if SENTRY_DSN unset or @sentry/node not installed; (4) apps/scraper/src/lib/tracer.ts — lightweight OTel-compatible span tracer using pino structured logs: startSpan(op, fn), startRootSpan(op, fn), Span with traceId/spanId/parentId/operation/attributes/end(). Instrumented processArticleGroup with 3 child spans: pipeline.classify, pipeline.geo, pipeline.verify. Instrumented scrapeAll() with root span scraper.cycle. Updated index.ts: initSentry() + requestLoggerPlugin + /api/v1/health. Updated .env.example with SENTRY_DSN and OTel upgrade notes. Added health.test.ts (11 test cases: checkDb ok/down, checkRedis ok/degraded/down, deriveOverallStatus all combinations).

completed_tasks.phase: Competitive: CelesTrak orbital satellite tracking
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 37: Added CelesTrak orbital satellite tracking. (1) apps/scraper/src/sources/celestrak.ts — 353-line SATCAT polling source: polls CelesTrak SATCAT JSON API (https://celestrak.org/SATCAT/query.php?GROUP=active&FORMAT=json) every 30 min; generates signals for recent launches (within 7 days) and re-entries/decays (within 3 days); max 10 signals/poll; 48h Redis dedup by INTLDES+event_type; reliability 0.97 (authoritative source); Kafka pub to signals.verified; included in sources/index.ts as 9th OSINT poller. (2) apps/web/src/app/map/page.tsx — browser-side satellite visualization toggle: fetches CelesTrak GP JSON (active satellites) client-side from celestrak.org/GP.php?GROUP=active&FORMAT=json; parses orbital elements (INCLINATION, RA_OF_ASC_NODE) to approximate lat/lon positions; renders as MapLibre GeoJSON circle layer colored by OBJECT_TYPE (PAYLOAD=blue, ROCKET_BODY=gray, DEBRIS=red, UNKNOWN=white); 🛰️ SATS toggle button with count badge; loading spinner during fetch; handles map-not-yet-loaded edge case. WorldPulse now matches Shadowbroker's CelesTrak feature. Commit may be blocked by NTFS index.lock — user must run: del .git\index.lock then git commit.

completed_tasks.phase: Competitive: NASA GIBS satellite imagery overlay on live map (counters Shadowbroker)
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 36: Added NASA GIBS MODIS Terra satellite imagery toggle to the live map. (1) New satelliteMode boolean state + gibsDate (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to yesterday — MODIS has ~1 day delay); (2) useEffect dynamically adds/removes 'nasa-gibs' raster WMTS source from NASA Earthdata GIBS and 'nasa-satellite' raster layer; inserted before 'cluster-halo' layer so signal pins remain visible over imagery; handles map-not-yet-loaded edge case via map.once('load', applyLayer); (3) Filter bar: 🛰 SAT toggle button (green when active) + inline date picker (2000-02-24 to yesterday) visible when active; (4) WMTS tile URL: gibs.earthdata.nasa.gov/wmts/epsg3857/best/MODIS_Terra_CorrectedReflectance_TrueColor/default/{date}/GoogleMapsCompatible/{z}/{y}/{x}.jpg; maxzoom 9, opacity 0.72, full attribution. Directly counters Shadowbroker's NASA GIBS feature launched March 2026 — WorldPulse now has satellite imagery parity. Commit blocked by NTFS index.lock; user must run: del .git\index.lock && git add apps/web/src/app/map/page.tsx && git commit -m 'feat(map): add NASA GIBS satellite imagery overlay'.

completed_tasks.phase: P1-5 + P1-6: Live signal counter + interactive news ticker
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 46: Fixed both P1-5 (hardcoded signal counter) and P1-6 (non-interactive ticker) in one cycle. completed_tasks.note: Cycle 60: Implemented public API endpoint as core open-source differentiator. completed_tasks.phase: Competitive: Economic/Market Intelligence OSINT feed (counters Crucix VIX/Yahoo Finance feature)
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 59: Implemented Economic/Market Intelligence as the 13th OSINT signal source. (1) apps/scraper/src/sources/market.ts — 280-line new source: polls Yahoo Finance unofficial chart API (no auth key required) every 15 minutes for 5 key indicators: ^VIX (CBOE Fear Index), ^GSPC (S&P 500), ^IXIC (NASDAQ), BTC-USD (Bitcoin), CL=F (Crude Oil WTI). Exports: startMarketPoller, vixSeverity (VIX>=40→critical/>=30→high/>=25→medium), percentChangeSeverity (index/crypto/commodity thresholds), shouldEmitMarketSignal (VIX>=25, index>=2%, crypto>=10%, commodity>=5%), formatMarketTitle, formatMarketContent, marketDedupKey, buildYFUrl, MARKET_INDICATORS const. Redis dedup: osint:market:{symbol}:{directionTag}:{YYYY-MM-DD} 24h TTL. Signals: category:economy, location: NYSE (40.7069°N, 74.0089°W), reliability_score:0.90. (2) apps/scraper/src/sources/index.ts — updated: market.ts import + startMarketPoller try/catch block + updated header comment to '13 OSINT feeds total' + updated startup logger.info + export at bottom. (3) apps/scraper/src/sources/__tests__/osint-sources.test.ts — added 120+ lines of new tests: describe vixSeverity (4 cases), percentChangeSeverity (3 cases for index/crypto/commodity), shouldEmitMarketSignal (8 cases), formatMarketTitle (4 cases), marketDedupKey (2 cases). Direct competitive response to Crucix's 'Live market tickers (Yahoo Finance), VIX/credit risk gauges' feature. WorldPulse now at 13 OSINT feeds (up from 12).

completed_tasks.phase: Competitive: Telegram + Discord real-time alert system (counters Crucix core feature)
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 54: Implemented Telegram + Discord alert notification system — directly counters Crucix core feature ("pings you when something changes"). (1) apps/api/src/lib/notifications.ts — NotificationService class: sendTelegramMessage(chatId, text, token) via Telegram Bot API with HTML parse mode, severity emojis (🔴🟠🟡🟢), reliability dots; sendDiscordMessage(webhookUrl, signal) via Discord Embed API with severity color coding (red/orange/yellow/green); formatSignalAlert(signal) formatter. Error-safe fire-and-forget pattern. (2) apps/api/src/lib/alert-dispatcher.ts — AlertDispatcher: shouldNotify() with Redis dedup (notif:sent:{userId}:{signalId} 24h TTL), severity threshold + category filter; dispatchAlerts() loops all users; startDispatcher() polls every 60s for signals in last 2 min; stopDispatcher() for graceful shutdown. (3) apps/api/src/routes/notifications.ts — 3 endpoints: GET /notifications/settings (JWT auth, Redis get), PUT /notifications/settings (JWT auth, save encrypted to Redis notif:{userId}:settings), POST /notifications/test (JWT auth, 3rpm rate limit, sends test to configured channels). (4) Registered in apps/api/src/index.ts — notificationsRoutes plugin + startDispatcher(). (5) apps/web/src/app/settings/notifications/page.tsx — full settings UI: Telegram bot token (masked field), Chat ID, Discord webhook URL, min severity toggle (critical/high/medium/low), category filter chips, enable/disable toggle, Save + Send Test buttons with toast feedback. (6) apps/api/src/__tests__/notifications.test.ts — 8+ test cases covering message formatting, severity emoji, Discord embed structure, shouldNotify dedup, shouldNotify category filter, shouldNotify severity threshold. Direct competitive response to Crucix Telegram/Discord alerting feature.

weaknesses_identified: Ground News expanded to 50K+ sources + Podcasts/Opinions — widening content moat
Shadowbroker now at ~4.7K GitHub stars (up from 2.0K in March 2026) — stable
Crucix (calesthio/Crucix) now at 5.2K GitHub stars — EXPLOSIVE growth (was 2.7K one week ago, +93%) — GitHub's Hottest OSINT Project
Crucix has 27 feeds vs WorldPulse 13 feeds — gap narrowing (was 10 feeds before cycle 59)
AI content farms growing at 300-500 new sites/month — WorldPulse has open-source slop detection
Taranis AI (open-source OSINT + NLP) is a direct threat
OSINT Monitor (marcko80/osintmonitor) — desktop OSINT app, 150+ RSS feeds — desktop-only but RSS count gap notable
Veracity (open-source) — AI fact-checking with multilingual + numerical scoring — academic tool but could commoditize reliability scoring
strengths_identified: Solid monorepo architecture with Turborepo + pnpm
Map page with Supercluster, WebSocket, severity pins, filter bar — complete
Full search: Meilisearch pipeline + Cmd+K palette + search page — complete
Signal detail, user profiles, onboarding flow — all implemented
ReliabilityDots + FlagModal community verification UI — complete
Rate limiting covers ALL endpoints with Redis backend — production-grade
Redis caching on feed + signals + search — fast anonymous reads
Scraper with retry, circuit breaker, DLQ, health dashboard — production-grade
Kafka consumer lag monitoring via Prometheus + Grafana — complete
~60 E2E + 15+ test files covering all critical paths — strong coverage
Security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS, etc.) via Next.js middleware — complete
Developer API key system (free/pro/enterprise tiers) — complete
AI signal summaries (OpenAI/Ollama/extractive fallback, Redis cached) — complete
8 OSINT feeds: GDELT + ADS-B + AIS + USGS Seismic + NASA FIRMS + NOAA SWPC + GPS Jamming + IODA Internet Outages — now complete (Cycle 28)
AI slop detection: open-source content farm heuristic scorer + admin badge + 25-domain blocklist — direct alternative to NewsGuard (Cycle 29)
NASA GIBS satellite imagery overlay on live map — MODIS Terra true-color, 🛰 SAT toggle + date picker, full 25-year archive, WMTS tiles — parity with Shadowbroker (Cycle 36)

CelesTrak orbital satellite tracking — 9th OSINT feed; SATCAT poller (launches + re-entries); browser-side GP visualization layer with object-type color coding — competitive parity with Shadowbroker's CelesTrak integration (Cycle 37)

STIX 2.1 threat intelligence export — 3 API endpoints (single/bulk/TAXII-like feed), full STIX 2.1 compliance, SignalToStixConverter class, API key auth, rate limited — direct competitive parity with Shadowbroker's STIX export (Cycle 40)
Carrier Strike Group OSINT tracker — 10th OSINT feed; all 11 US Navy carriers, USNI News RSS, theater position estimation, 30+ test cases — closes last remaining gap vs Shadowbroker (Cycle 48)

GraphQL API layer at /api/graphql — mercurius plugin, full schema (Signal, User, Query types), resolvers with Redis caching, GraphiQL in dev, JIT compilation — NO competitor has GraphQL, pure WorldPulse differentiator (Cycle 49)

Economic/Market Intelligence — 13th OSINT feed; VIX fear index + S&P 500 + NASDAQ + BTC + Crude Oil via Yahoo Finance; threshold-based emission (VIX>=25, index>=2%, crypto>=10%, oil>=5%); 21 new test cases — direct counter to Crucix's Yahoo Finance/VIX market tickers (Cycle 59)
notes: Cycle 65: Multi-LLM provider support implemented. signal-summary.ts now supports 5 providers in priority order: Anthropic claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 → OpenAI gpt-4o-mini → Google Gemini 2.0 Flash → OpenRouter (100+ models) → Ollama local → extractive fallback. AISummary.model type updated, .env.example updated, 4 new tests added. Audit found P2-3/P2-4/P3-2/i18n already done from prior cycles (now recorded). WorldMonitor has upgraded to full website (worldmonitor.app) with 4-tier AI fallback chain including local LLMs — elevated threat. No new news intelligence startups found with significant funding. Crucix stable ~5.2K stars, still 27 feeds, 7 LLM providers. Ground News stable v4.27.0. Next priorities: (1) P2-4b Verification Log UI in signal detail; (2) Multi-LLM Settings UI in admin; (3) WorldMonitor response — improve AI analysis UI to counter their 4-tier local LLM angle; (4) Developer docs update for new LLM providers. --- Cycle 62: ReliabilityDots tooltip enhanced (P2-1). Removed hasTooltip gate — tooltip always shows on hover with score % + colour-coded bar. All 7 usage sites now covered including posts/search pages that previously got no tooltip. Commit blocked by NTFS HEAD.lock. Competition scan: Ground News stable (no new features), Crucix stable ~5.2K stars (growth plateau), no new news-intelligence startups funded. Next priorities: (1) P2-3 Scraper Process Health Monitor; (2) P2-4 Verification Log Population; (3) P3-2 Bottom Tab Bar for Mobile; (4) Multilingual signal support; (5) Multi-LLM configurability. --- Cycle 61 (prior run notes preserved below) --- Cycle 60: Public API endpoint implemented (P2-6). GET /api/v1/public/signals — no auth, 60rpm/IP, CORS, 30s Redis cache, verified-only, 8 fields. docs/api.md added with full reference. 10 test cases. No competitor has a documented public no-auth API — pure WorldPulse differentiator. NEW COMPETITOR: eYou (Romanian startup, €300K pre-seed, fact-checking social platform, launch May 2026) — adjacent threat, low priority. Crucix update: added Ollama self-hosted LLM provider (now 7 LLM providers), mobile UI fixes, still 27 feeds, ~5.2K stars. Next priorities: (1) P2-1 Reliability Score Explainer Tooltip; (2) Multilingual signal support; (3) Multi-LLM provider configurability in AI summaries; (4) P3-2 Bottom Tab Bar for Mobile; (5) P2-4 Verification Log Population. --- Cycle 59: Economic/Market Intelligence OSINT feed added (market.ts). 13th OSINT feed: VIX + S&P 500 + NASDAQ + BTC + Crude Oil via Yahoo Finance unofficial API. No auth key required. Threshold-based emission prevents noise. Directly counters Crucix 'Yahoo Finance / VIX / credit risk' feature. Test coverage: 21 new test cases in osint-sources.test.ts. Competition scan: Crucix stable ~5.2K stars, now confirmed 6-LLM-provider support (Claude/GPT/Gemini/OpenRouter/ChatGPT/MiniMax). Ground News stable. No new news-intelligence startups with funding. Next priorities: (1) Multilingual signal support (counter Veracity AI paper); (2) P2-1 Reliability Score Explainer Tooltip; (3) P2-6 Public API endpoint (no-auth, 60rpm per IP); (4) P3-2 Bottom Tab Bar for Mobile.
